name.full: My Time Off — PTO balances, requests & team approvals

description.short: View, request, and track time off across your team in Microsoft 365 Copilot.
description.full: My Time Off surfaces an employee's PTO inside Microsoft 365 Copilot as three interactive SharePoint Copilot components: a personal overview of remaining vacation, sick and personal balances with upcoming leave and recent requests; a request experience that checks the user's Outlook calendar for conflicts before booking; and a team view where everyone sees who's out and managers approve or decline pending requests inline. Every component reads and writes its data with the signed-in user's own delegated identity, calling SharePoint and Microsoft Graph directly from the client.
